Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

101 
HOSP_AT_HOME_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Hospital at Home Room and Board (R&B) Charge Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This variable represents the charge amount for room and board hospital at home care, related to a 
beneficiary’s acute hospital at home stay. 
SHORT NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_CHRG_AMT 
LONG NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field was
